meta.title: F90+ — Predict the 2026 World Cup with friends
meta.description: The free, social way to predict every match of the 2026 World Cup. Tokens F90, global leaderboards, and a football-smart AI. No real money — just glory.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in and keep calling the World Cup.

signup.title: Join F90+
signup.subtitle: Create your free profile. Tokens F90, zero risk.

magic.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it to continue.

auth.disclaimer: No real money, no gambling. Just predictions and pride.

errors.sendFailed: We couldn't send the link. Try again.
errors.auth: We couldn't complete sign-in. Try again.
errors.oauth: We couldn't connect to Google. Try again.

onboarding.title: Almost there
onboarding.subtitle: Pick your handle and the nation you're backing. You can change them later.

username.label: Your player handle
username.hint: 3–20 characters. Lowercase letters, numbers and underscore.

errors.countryInvalid: Pick a nation from the list.

home.subtitle: Your World Cup starts here.
home.soon: Predictions and markets are coming very soon. Meanwhile, explore the World Cup.

profile.metaDescription: {handle}'s F90+ profile — predict the 2026 World Cup.
profile.rankTeaser: The ranking begins when predictions open.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your F90+ identity.
settings.cooldownHint: You can change this again on {date}.

errors.usernameCooldown: You can't change your handle yet (30-day wait).
errors.countryCooldown: You can't change your nation yet (30-day wait).

hero.subtitle: Make your calls, earn Tokens F90, and climb a global leaderboard with friends and rivals worldwide. Free forever — bragging rights are the only currency that's real.

countdown.label: The tournament kicks off in
countdown.liveSub: Matches are rolling — make your calls.

globe.a11y: Interactive 2026 World Cup globe: hosts and qualified teams

matches.title: Tonight under the lights
matches.subtitle: Giant fixtures, instant calls. Pick a side and the table reacts in real time.

howItWorks.title: Three taps to glory
howItWorks.subtitle: No wallet, no risk, no nonsense. Just football and bragging rights.
howItWorks.step1Body: Predict winners, scorelines and big moments before kickoff. Every call costs Tokens F90 — spend them wisely.
howItWorks.step2Body: Nail your predictions to bank points and rise through a global leaderboard that moves with the World Cup.
howItWorks.step3Body: Build private leagues, talk some trash, and let our football-smart AI pundit challenge your gut with the stats.

fantasy.title: Build your dream squad
fantasy.subtitle: More than predicting: earn Tokens F90, enter the markets, sign players and field your XI. The World Cup like you've never played it.

leaderboard.title: The global leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: The World Cup's sharpest analysts, live.
leaderboard.subtitleEmpty: It opens when predictions start — the top spot is up for grabs.

cta.title: The World Cup hits different with skin in the game.
cta.subtitle: Virtual skin, that is. Join F90+ free and turn every match into a moment.
cta.disclaimer: No deposits. No payouts. No gambling. Just predictions and pride.

footer.disclaimer: F90+ is a free-to-play prediction game. It uses virtual Tokens F90 only and involves no real money or gambling.
footer.rights: Built for the love of the game.

copilot.name: The Analyst
copilot.sectionSubtitle: Before every match, the Analyst reads the data — form, quality, head-to-head and the market — and gives you an honest, probabilistic call. No paid AI, no black box.

driver.elo: {team} is the stronger side on rating
driver.even: The data sees this finely balanced

copilot.value: Your model rates {team} {pct}% above the market — a contrarian angle.
copilot.disclaimer: Probabilities for entertainment. Not betting advice — F90+ is free and virtual.

field.title: 48 nations. One trophy.
field.analyst: The draw is done. 48 nations, 12 groups, one road to the final at MetLife on July 19. Explore who made it, how they're drawn, and the bracket that settles it all.

groups.title: Twelve groups, one road
groups.subtitle: The group stage as drawn in Washington, D.C. The top two of each group — plus the eight best third-placed sides — reach the knockouts.
groups.analyst: The Analyst's toughest draw: Group {group} — four sides who can all dream of the last 32.

bracket.title: The bracket to the final
bracket.subtitle: After the groups, 32 nations enter a straight knockout — all the way to MetLife Stadium on July 19.

key.title: The fixtures that matter
key.subtitle: The opener, the marquee ties and the World Cup markets — with the Analyst's conviction. Take your position with F90.
